'''鈭歳-th-v''' ('''rathava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unanonymise|unanonymise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-th-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unanonymise|unanonymise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-th-v
|-
! Lemma
| rathava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rathavithi|rathavithi]] || [[word:rathaviji|rathaviji]] || [[word:rathavishi|rathavishi]] || [[word:rathavi|rathavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rathavuthuth|rathavuthuth]] || [[word:rathavujuj|rathavujuj]] || [[word:rathavushush|rathavushush]] || [[word:rathav|rathav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rathavuthu|rathavuthu]] || [[word:rathavuju|rathavuju]] || [[word:rathavushu|rathavushu]] || [[word:rathavu|rathavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rathavufuth|rathavufuth]] || [[word:rathavufuj|rathavufuj]] || [[word:rathavufush|rathavufush]] || [[word:rathavuf|rathavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rathavethe|rathavethe]] || [[word:rathaveje|rathaveje]] || [[word:rathaveshe|rathaveshe]] || [[word:rathave|rathave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rathavothoth|rathavothoth]] || [[word:rathavojoj|rathavojoj]] || [[word:rathavoshosh|rathavoshosh]] || [[word:rathav|rathav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rathavotho|rathavotho]] || [[word:rathavojo|rathavojo]] || [[word:rathavosho|rathavosho]] || [[word:rathavo|rathavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rathavofoth|rathavofoth]] || [[word:rathavofoj|rathavofoj]] || [[word:rathavofosh|rathavofosh]] || [[word:rathavof|rathavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rathav忙th忙|rathav忙th忙]] || [[word:rathav忙j忙|rathav忙j忙]] || [[word:rathav忙sh忙|rathav忙sh忙]] || [[word:rathav忙|rathav忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rathavathath|rathavathath]] || [[word:rathavajaj|rathavajaj]] || [[word:rathavashash|rathavashash]] || [[word:rathav|rathav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rathavatha|rathavatha]] || [[word:rathavaja|rathavaja]] || [[word:rathavasha|rathavasha]] || [[word:rathava|rathava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rathavafath|rathavafath]] || [[word:rathavafaj|rathavafaj]] || [[word:rathavafash|rathavafash]] || [[word:rathavaf|rathavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:rathavasha|rathavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gorathavasha|gorathavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokirathavasha|gokirathavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:rathavn眉sha|rathavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gorathavnkn眉sha|gorathavnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokirathavn眉sha|gokirathavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rathavsh毛sha|rathavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorathavnksh毛sha|gorathavnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirathavsh毛sha|gokirathavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rathavrosha|rathavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorathavnkrosha|gorathavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirathavrosha|gokirathavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rathavmusha|rathavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gorathavnkmusha|gorathavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirathavmusha|gokirathavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:rathavsherasha|rathavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gorathavnksherasha|gorathavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokirathavsherasha|gokirathavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:rathavngasha|rathavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gorathavnkngasha|gorathavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokirathavngasha|gokirathavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rathavyasha|rathavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gorathavnkyasha|gorathavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokirathavyasha|gokirathavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:rathavyamasha|rathavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gorathavnkyamasha|gorathavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokirathavyamasha|gokirathavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:rathavn眉sh毛sha|rathavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorathavnkn眉sh毛sha|gorathavnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirathavn眉sh毛sha|gokirathavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rathavn眉rosha|rathavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorathavnkn眉rosha|gorathavnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirathavn眉rosha|gokirathavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rathavn眉musha|rathavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorathavnkn眉musha|gorathavnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirathavn眉musha|gokirathavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:rathavsh毛n眉sha|rathavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorathavnksh毛n眉sha|gorathavnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirathavsh毛n眉sha|gokirathavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rathavsh毛rosha|rathavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorathavnksh毛rosha|gorathavnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirathavsh毛rosha|gokirathavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rathavsh毛musha|rathavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorathavnksh毛musha|gorathavnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirathavsh毛musha|gokirathavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:rathavron眉sha|rathavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorathavnkron眉sha|gorathavnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirathavron眉sha|gokirathavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:rathavrosh毛sha|rathavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorathavnkrosh毛sha|gorathavnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirathavrosh毛sha|gokirathavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rathavromusha|rathavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorathavnkromusha|gorathavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirathavromusha|gokirathavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:rathavmun眉sha|rathavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorathavnkmun眉sha|gorathavnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirathavmun眉sha|gokirathavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:rathavmush毛sha|rathavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorathavnkmush毛sha|gorathavnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirathavmush毛sha|gokirathavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rathavmurosha|rathavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorathavnkmurosha|gorathavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirathavmurosha|gokirathavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:rathav|rathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:r忙th忙v|r忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horathav|horathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hor忙th忙v|hor忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorathav|hohorathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohor忙th忙v|hohor忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉rathav|n眉rathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉r忙th忙v|n眉r忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉rathav|n眉n眉rathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉r忙th忙v|n眉n眉r忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂rathav|n茂rathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂r忙th忙v|n茂r忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂rathav|n茂n茂rathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂r忙th忙v|n茂n茂r忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lurathav|lurathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lur忙th忙v|lur忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurathav|lulurathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulur忙th忙v|lulur忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lirathav|lirathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lir忙th忙v|lir忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirathav|lilirathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilir忙th忙v|lilir忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:korathav|korathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kor忙th忙v|kor忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorathav|kokorathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokor忙th忙v|kokor忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kerathav|kerathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ker忙th忙v|ker忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerathav|kekerathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keker忙th忙v|keker忙th忙v]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
